now: [S90][COHESION] Social Dashboard bidirectional mirror — implement the cross-repo normalized activity feed mirror path. Requires cross-repo write confirmation. next: [SIL:2⛔] Genius Hit List as scheduled audit — DONE S88: scheduled-audit generator now exists and can be rerun with `npm run genius:list`.
